common.name: Name
cs.c1_quote: In six months I went from a salesperson with no code to a junior developer at a scale-up. The difference was the focus on real projects — I had a portfolio to show in interviews.
cs.c2_quote: I already worked in design but was stuck. The guided paths gave me the structure I was missing — design systems, research, accessibility. The promotion came naturally.
cs.c3_quote: We uploaded our procedure manuals and the platform generated personalized courses for 340 nurses. Compliance and continuous training solved without hiring external trainers.
cs.c4_quote: I finished my management degree without knowing Python or SQL. In 4 months I completed the full data analysis path and was hired via NeuroLearn's own talent marketplace.

pay.setup_1: Create a Stripe account at stripe.com. Activate business account with VAT and IBAN.
pay.setup_2: Create Products + Prices in Stripe Dashboard (3 products: monthly, annual, lifetime) and copy the price_xxx IDs.
pay.setup_3: Add secrets in Supabase: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET.
pay.setup_4: Webhook in Stripe Dashboard pointing to stripe-webhook edge function.
pay.setup_5: Events to subscribe: checkout.session.completed, customer.subscription.*, charge.refunded, payment_intent.payment_failed.
pay.setup_6: Fill company info in nl_platform_config (company_name, vat_number, company_address, support_email).
pi.cta_desc: We review every application in 48h. No application fee. No commitment until you publish your first course.
price.title: 💰 Price suggestion (market research)
ps.cta_desc: Free tier with no time limit. No credit card. Instant access to hundreds of courses and paths.
so.cta_desc: More than four languages, three business models, one mission: making useful learning accessible.
so.story_p1: We started NeuroLearn after noticing a repeated pattern: professionals with courses on their résumé but unable to deliver real projects. Universities teaching 2010 content in a world that changes monthly. Course platforms focused on selling, not on guaranteeing results.
so.story_p2: We decided to build the opposite. A platform where every lesson ends with something delivered — code, design, analysis, decision. Where companies can upload their own materials and generate personalized courses in hours, not months. Where certified students are automatically introduced to real openings via the talent marketplace.
so.story_p3: Today we serve B2C, B2B and talent matching on a single international platform. And we keep iterating every day.

value_prop.body: Over 12,000 professionals have already transformed their careers with NeuroLearn. Up-to-date content, market-recognised certificates and real human support.
why.point1.body: Not auto-generated filler. Our courses are built and reviewed by working AI practitioners, with real-world examples and up-to-date industry context.
why.point2.body: Technology moves at a dizzying pace. Our content is updated monthly so you're always learning what the market demands today.
why.point3.body: 100% practical focus. Every lesson includes real examples, working code and a concrete challenge to apply immediately in your job.
why.point4.body: Our certificates are verifiable online and increasingly requested by tech companies across Europe and beyond.
why.point5.body: Learn alongside thousands of professionals. Share projects, get unstuck and build your network in a community that's genuinely helpful.
why.point6.body: Our team responds within 24 hours. We're real people who know the content and genuinely want you to succeed.

testimonial1.text: In 3 months I went from "I know nothing about AI" to deploying an automated contract analysis system at my company. The ROI was positive in week one.
testimonial2.text: The LangChain Agents course changed my career. I received three job offers while still mid-course. The quality is in a different league.
testimonial3.text: As a non-technical manager I was sceptical. After the AI for Business course I automated our monthly reporting and saved 12 hours a week. Paid for itself in week two.

Hello {{name}},

We noticed you're 70% through the "{{course_name}}" course.

Do you know what that means? You're almost ready to receive your certificate! Come back now and finish — it takes less than 2 hours.

Go for it! 💪
NeuroLearn Team
email.welcome.body:
Hello {{name}},

Welcome to the largest AI platform!

Your next step: start with the "{{recommended_course}}" course — it was specially chosen for your profile.

You have 7 days to try everything for free.

See you on the platform!
NeuroLearn Team

legal.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
legal.terms.s1_body: By accessing or using this platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the service. The service is provided to users worldwide and these Terms apply regardless of your location.
legal.terms.s2_body: You must be at least 16 years old (or the minimum age in your jurisdiction) to create an account. You are responsible for keeping your credentials secure and for all activity under your account. Provide accurate information and update it as needed.
legal.terms.s3_body: Course content, including text, video, images, and other materials, is owned by the respective instructors or the platform and is protected by copyright. When you enrol, you receive a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access the content for personal learning. You may not redistribute, resell, or publicly broadcast the content.
legal.terms.s4_body: Prices are shown in the currency selected at checkout and include applicable taxes where required by law. EU consumers may have a 14-day right of withdrawal for digital content, which you waive when access to the content begins (unless still legally entitled). Subscription billing renews automatically until cancelled. You can cancel a subscription anytime from your account settings; cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing cycle.
legal.terms.s5_body: You agree not to misuse the platform: no unauthorized access, scraping, harassment, illegal content, infringement of others' rights, or interference with our infrastructure. Instructors may not publish content that violates intellectual property, includes hate speech, or is otherwise unlawful.
legal.terms.s6_body: You may delete your account at any time. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms, after notice where reasonably possible. On termination, your license to access purchased content ends and outstanding payments remain due.
legal.terms.s7_body: The service is provided "as is" without warranties beyond those required by law. To the maximum extent permitted, we are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. Nothing in these Terms limits liability for fraud, gross negligence, or anything that cannot be excluded by law.
legal.terms.s8_body: These Terms are governed by the laws of Portugal (where the operator is established), without prejudice to mandatory consumer protections that apply in your country of residence. Disputes may be brought before competent courts or the EU Online Dispute Resolution platform.
legal.terms.s9_body: For any question about these Terms, contact us at the email shown in the footer.

integrations.subtitle: Configure all external connections in one place
legal.cookies.s1_body: Cookies are small text files stored in your browser. We also use similar technologies (local storage, web pixels). This policy explains what we use them for and how to control them.
legal.cookies.s2_body: Essential — required for login, security, language preference. Cannot be disabled. Analytics — anonymous usage statistics. Optional, you choose. Marketing — measure campaign effectiveness. Off by default. Detailed list available on request.
legal.cookies.s3_body: Use our cookie banner to accept all, reject optional, or pick categories. You can change your choice anytime via the link in the footer. You can also configure your browser to block or delete cookies, but essentials may be re-set automatically.
legal.privacy.s1_body: This platform is operated from Portugal and is a data controller under the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). For any privacy question, contact the email shown in the footer.
legal.privacy.s2_body: Account data: name, email, password (hashed), preferences. Learning data: courses enrolled, lessons completed, certificates issued. Payment data: handled by Stripe (we never see card numbers). Communication data: emails you send us. Technical data: IP, browser, language, basic device info — used for security and analytics. Cookies: see our Cookie Policy.
legal.privacy.s3_body: To deliver the service (contract performance): account, learning, billing. To meet legal obligations: invoicing, tax records. To improve the platform (legitimate interest): aggregated analytics, security. With your consent: marketing emails, optional cookies. You can withdraw consent at any time.
legal.privacy.s4_body: Trusted processors that help us run the service: Supabase (database & auth, EU), Vercel (hosting, EU/US), Resend (email delivery, EU), Stripe (payments, global), Mux (video, US), Daily.co (video meetings, global), Anthropic (AI generation, US). All transfers outside the EU use Standard Contractual Clauses or equivalent safeguards. We do not sell personal data.
legal.privacy.s5_body: Account data: while your account is active and up to 6 months after deletion (for security/disputes). Billing data: 10 years (legal accounting requirement). Marketing consents: until withdrawn. Analytics data: aggregated and anonymized after 13 months.
legal.privacy.s6_body: You have the right to: access your data, correct inaccuracies, delete your account, port your data, object to or restrict processing, withdraw consent, and lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority (in Portugal: CNPD — cnpd.pt). To exercise any right, email us through the footer link.
legal.privacy.s7_body: The platform is not intended for users under 16. If we learn we collected data from a child without verifiable parental consent, we will delete it.
legal.privacy.s8_body: We apply industry-standard safeguards: TLS in transit, encryption at rest, hashed passwords, RLS access control. No system is 100% secure; we'll notify you of significant breaches as required by law.
